title: A New Look Into Alola
description: A Pack that adds new Alolan forms for Pokémon that just missed out.
body:
Do you love Alola... Do you love Alolan Region Variants... yes, well this pack adds those Pokemon you may have felt were missing from Pokemon in Gen 7 that should have been given a regional variant to those that were never even in the game that should have been.

**Disclamer** I will not be listing each new pokemon variant. The intended way of discovering these new forms is base survival if you really want to know what each one is look at the catalogs and through commands or survival discovery.
